V009-N00172.label: 百合病
V009-N00172.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V009-N00172.label: 百合病
V009-N00172.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜脑系疾病
V009-N00172.definition: 以神情恍惚，行、卧、饮食等皆觉不适为主要 表现的神志疾病。

V009-N00172.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V009-N00172.label: 百合病
V009-N00172.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜心病
V009-N00172.definition: 多继发于急性热病，或中毒、脑部疾患等之后，余邪未尽，阴液亏损，气血失调，经脉失养，心神惑乱。以神情恍惚，行、卧、饮食等皆觉不适为主要表现的脑神疾病。

V009-N00172.label: 百合病
V009-N00172.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜精神情志病类
V009-N00172.definition: 多继发于急性热病，或中毒、脑部疾患等之后，余邪未尽，阴液亏损，气血失调，经脉失养，心神惑乱。以神情恍惚，行、卧、饮食等皆觉不适为主要表现的脑神疾病。

V009-N00189.label: 真心痛
V009-N00189.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病

V009-N00189.label: 厥心痛
V009-N00189.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病｜真心痛

V009-N00189.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00189.label: 真心痛
V009-N00189.path: GBT 16751.1-2023 中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病
V009-N00189.definition: 因胸阳虚损，或气阴不足，或瘀痰阻痹，心脉闭塞所致。临床以猝发心胸剧痛，甚或持续不解，可伴见汗出、肢冷，面白，唇青，手足青至节，脉微欲绝或结代等为特征的突发性心系病重症。

V009-N00189.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00189.label: 厥心痛
V009-N00189.path: GBT 16751.1-2023 中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病｜真心痛
V009-N00189.definition: 因五脏虚损，七情所伤，气逆乘心，或寒热诸邪逆犯心包，痰瘀阻痹，心经气逆所致。临床以心痛彻背、背痛彻心，劳累则甚，静息则缓，可伴见气从脘腹上冲咽喉，胸脘痞闷，善太息，甚则手足逆冷，面色青黑等为特征的阵发性真心痛。

V009-N00189.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V009-N00189.label: 真心痛
V009-N00189.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜心病
V009-N00189.definition: 以心胸剧痛，持续不解，伴汗出肢冷，面白唇青，手足青至节，脉微欲绝为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00189.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V009-N00189.label: 厥心痛
V009-N00189.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜心病｜真心痛
V009-N00189.definition: 以心痛发作伴四肢厥冷为主要表现的轻症真心痛。

V009-N00189.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00189.label: 厥心痛
V009-N00189.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00189.definition: A paroxysmal heart condition characterized by cardiac pain radiating toward the back and aggravates upon physical exertion and alleviates after rest. Associated symptoms include upward rushing of qi to the throat, chest discomfort, repeated sighing, cold limbs and a dark-bluish facial complexion. Often results from deficiency of the five zang organs, emotional disturbance, and pathogenic factors affecting the pericardium or phlegm stasis obstructing the heart.

V009-N00189.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00189.label: 真心痛
V009-N00189.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00189.definition: A critical heart condition characterized by sudden, severe or persistent cardiac pain. Associated symptoms include sweats, cold limbs, a pale face, bluish lips and an extremely feeble or regularly/irregularly intermittent pulse. Often results from heart yang deficiency, insufficiency of qi and yin, or phlegm-stasis obstructing the heart vessels.

V009-N00189.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00189.label: 真心痛
V009-N00189.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V009-N00189.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00189.label: 真心痛
V009-N00189.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V009-N00189.label: 厥心痛
V009-N00189.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜心系疾病
V009-N00189.definition: 一种较真心痛为轻的心系疾病，以心痛发作 时伴四肢厥冷为主要临床特征。

V009-N00189.label: 真心痛
V009-N00189.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜心系疾病
V009-N00189.definition: 以心胸剧痛，持续不解，伴有汗出肢冷，面白 唇青，手足青至节，脉微欲绝为主要表现的 疾病。

V009-N00189.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V009-N00189.label: 厥心痛
V009-N00189.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜心病｜胸痹
V009-N00189.definition: 因胸阳虚损，或气阴不足，或瘀痰阻痹、心脉闭塞所致。以心胸剧痛、甚至持续不解，伴有汗出肢冷、面白唇青、脉微欲绝为主要表现的痛症类疾病。

V009-N00189.label: 真心痛
V009-N00189.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜心系病证
V009-N00189.definition: 是胸痹进一步发展的严重病证，其特点为剧烈而持久的胸骨后疼痛，伴心悸、水肿、肢冷、喘促、汗出、面色苍白等症状。病因为寒邪内侵、饮食失调、情志失节、年迈体弱。病机为心脉痹阻，病位在心，涉及肝脾肾等。

V009-N00186.label: 胸痹心痛
V009-N00186.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病

V009-N00186.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00186.label: 胸痹心痛
V009-N00186.path: GBT 16751.1-2023 中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病
V009-N00186.definition: 因胸阳不振，阴寒、痰浊、血瘀等留踞胸廓，或心气不足，鼓动乏力，致使气血痹阻，心失血养所致。临床以胸闷、气短及发作性心胸疼痛等为特征的心系病。

V009-N00186.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V009-N00186.label: 胸痹
V009-N00186.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜心病
V009-N00186.definition: 胸阳不振，以胸闷或发作性心胸疼痛为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00186.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00186.label: 胸痹心痛
V009-N00186.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00186.definition: Characterized by chest tightness, shortness of breath and paroxysmal cardiac pain. Often occurs when heart qi fails to pump blood and results in malnourishment of the heart.

V009-N00186.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00186.label: 胸痹
V009-N00186.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V009-N00186.label: 胸痹
V009-N00186.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜心系疾病
V009-N00186.definition: 以胸闷或发作性心胸疼痛为主要表现的疾 病。

V009-N00186.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V009-N00186.label: 胸痹
V009-N00186.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜心病
V009-N00186.definition: 胸阳不振，阴寒、痰浊留踞胸廓，或心气不足，鼓动乏力，使气血痹阻，心失血养所致。以胸闷及发作性心胸疼痛为主要表现的内脏痹病类疾病。

V009-N00186.label: 胸痹
V009-N00186.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜心系病证
V009-N00186.definition: 是指胸部闷痛，甚则胸痛彻背，喘息不得卧为主症的一种疾病。轻者仅感胸闷隐痛，呼吸欠畅，重者则有胸痛，严重者心痛彻背，背痛彻心。病因为寒邪内侵、饮食失调、情志失节、年迈体弱。病机为心脉痹阻，病位在心，涉及肝脾肾等。

V009-N00194.label: 肝痈
V009-N00194.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病

V009-N00194.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00194.label: 肝痈
V009-N00194.path: GBT 16751.1-2023 中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病
V009-N00194.definition: 因湿热或虫毒等淤积于肝，气血腐败，酿成痈脓所致。临床以骤然发热，右胁胀痛，逐渐加剧，日渐消瘦，甚或肝脏脓肿溃破，剧烈腹痛，或伴见咳吐脓血，下痢脓血及虚脱等为特征的肝系痈病。

V009-N00194.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V009-N00194.label: 肝痈
V009-N00194.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜肝胆病
V009-N00194.definition: 以发热，右胁腹部疼痛拒按，右胁下肿块为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00194.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00194.label: 肝痈
V009-N00194.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00194.definition: Characterized by a sudden fever, gradually increased distending pain in the right subcostal region, and gradual weight loss. In severe cases, patients may experience severe abdominal pain following abscess rupture, coughing with phlegm that contains pus and blood, diarrhoea with stools that contain pus and blood and fainting. Often occurs when damp heat or parasitic toxin retains in the liver and form pus or abscess.

V009-N00194.label: 肝痈
V009-N00194.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜肝胆疾病
V009-N00194.definition: 以急起发热疼痛，右胁下肿块为主要表现的 疾病。

V009-N00194.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V009-N00194.label: 肝痈
V009-N00194.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肝胆病｜肝病
V009-N00194.definition: 因邪热虫毒等淤积于肝，致气血腐败，酿成痈脓。以急起发热、右胁痛、右胁下肿块等为主要表现的内脏痈病类疾病。

V009-N00194.label: 肝痈
V009-N00194.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证
V009-N00194.definition: 因邪热虫毒等淤积于肝，致气血腐败，酿成痈疾。以急起发热，右胁痛，右胁下肿块等为主要表现的内脏痈病类疾病。

V009-N00195.label: 肝着
V009-N00195.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病

V009-N00195.label: 肝胀
V009-N00195.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病

V009-N00195.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00195.label: 肝着
V009-N00195.path: GBT 16751.1-2023 中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病
V009-N00195.definition: 因劳怒所伤，肝木侮金，肺气不利，或寒凝气血，邪气痹阻肝经所致。临床以胸胁痞闷或胀，按揉捶击或舒，喜热饮，善太息，可伴见咳唾气急，嗳气，因情志不遂而诱发等为特征的肝系病。

V009-N00195.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00195.label: 肝胀
V009-N00195.path: GBT 16751.1-2023 中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病
V009-N00195.definition: 因饮食、劳倦或外邪伤肝，肝失疏泄，气血郁滞所致。临床以右胁胀痛，右胁下触及肿块，喜按喜揉，叩击则痛，可伴见疲劳、乏力，纳滞，腹痛等为特征的肝系病。

V009-N00195.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V009-N00195.label: 肝胀
V009-N00195.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜肝胆病
V009-N00195.definition: 以右胁胀痛，右胁下触及肿块，喜按喜揉，叩击则痛，可伴见疲劳、乏力、纳滞、腹痛等为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00195.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V009-N00195.label: 肝著
V009-N00195.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜肝胆病
V009-N00195.definition: 肝经气血郁滞，留着不行，以右胁或胸胁重着疼痛，或右胁下肿块，喜按喜揉等为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00195.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00195.label: 肝胀
V009-N00195.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00195.definition: Characterized by pain and lumps in the right subcostal region that alleviate upon pressing or patting. Often occurs as a result of liver qi/blood stagnation.

V009-N00195.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00195.label: 肝着
V009-N00195.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V009-N00195.label: 肝著
V009-N00195.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜肝胆疾病
V009-N00195.definition: 以右胁痛、右胁下肿块为主要表现的肝系疾 病。

V009-N00195.label: 肝著
V009-N00195.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证
V009-N00195.definition: 因肝热病、肝瘟等之后，肝脏气血郁滞，著而不行。以右胁痛，右胁下肿块，用手按捺捶击稍舒，肝功能异常等为主要表现的内脏胀[著]病类疾病。

V009-N00197.label: 胆胀病
V009-N00197.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病

V009-N00197.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00197.label: 胆胀病
V009-N00197.path: GBT 16751.1-2023 中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病
V009-N00197.definition: 因湿热痰瘀等邪滞着于胆，或因饮食失节、情志刺激，使胆气郁滞不舒所致。临床以右胁痞胀或隐痛，胁下或可触及痞块，嗳气、泛恶，口苦、纳差，厌油腻，时作时止或反复发作等为特征的肝系病。

V009-N00197.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V009-N00197.label: 胆胀
V009-N00197.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜肝胆病
V009-N00197.definition: 以反复发作右上腹（胆区）疼痛、痞胀为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00197.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00197.label: 胆胀
V009-N00197.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00197.definition: Characterized by recurrent right upper abdominal pain with stuffiness and distension. Often results from retention of damp heat or phlegm stasis in the gallbladder or anger-related gallbladder qi stagnation.

V009-N00197.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00197.label: 胆胀
V009-N00197.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V009-N00197.label: 胆胀
V009-N00197.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜肝胆疾病
V009-N00197.definition: 以反复发作右上腹疼痛、痞胀为主要表现的 胆道疾病。

V009-N00197.label: 胆胀
V009-N00197.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证
V009-N00197.definition: 因湿热瘀滞等邪阻滞于胆，或因情志郁怒等刺激，使胆气郁滞不舒，以反复发作右上腹疼痛，痞胀等为主要表现的内脏胀（著）病类疾病。

V009-N00199.label: 臌胀病
V009-N00199.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病

V009-N00199.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00199.label: 臌胀病
V009-N00199.path: GBT 16751.1-2023 中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病
V009-N00199.definition: 泛指因酗酒伤肝，或肝病或痨病、腹内癥积、蛊虫病日久，阻碍气血运行，水积于腹等引起以腹部膨胀如鼓为特征的一类疾病。注：包括酒臌、水臌、气臌、血臌、虫臌等。

V009-N00199.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00199.label: 臌胀病
V009-N00199.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00199.definition: Characterized by severe abdominal bulging (like a drum). Contributing factors may include excessive alcohol drinking, liver disease, tuberculosis, abdominal masses or schistosomiasis. This condition is subdivided into alcohol tympanites, water tympanites, qi tympanites, blood tympanites and parasitic tympanites.

V009-N00199.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00199.label: 鼓胀
V009-N00199.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V009-N00199.label: 鼓胀
V009-N00199.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证
V009-N00199.definition: 因酒食不节、情志刺激、虫毒感染、病后续发导致肝脾肾受伤，气滞血结，水停腹中。症见腹胀大如鼓、皮色苍黄、脉络暴露等。在古医籍中又称单腹胀、臌、蜘蛛蛊等。

V009-N00199.label: 鼓胀
V009-N00199.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜躯体症状｜胸腹症状
V009-N00199.definition: 腹大胀满，绷急如鼓，皮色苍黄，脉络显露的病证。

V009-N00206.label: 哮喘病
V009-N00206.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病

V009-N00206.label: 哮病
V009-N00206.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病｜哮喘病

V009-N00206.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00206.label: 哮喘病
V009-N00206.path: GBT 16751.1-2023 中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病
V009-N00206.definition: 因先天不足，或久病肺、脾、肾三脏虚损，致使宿痰留伏体内，或由外邪引动，痰阻气道所致。临床以发作性咳喘、气促，胸廓胀满，端坐呼吸，喉中哮鸣有声，甚则喘息不得平卧等为特征的肺系病。

V009-N00206.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00206.label: 哮病
V009-N00206.path: GBT 16751.1-2023 中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病｜哮喘病
V009-N00206.definition: 因禀赋异常，触及粉尘或刺激性气体等即发，或因外邪、劳累及饮食、情志失调等诱发，引动宿痰留饮，痰气交阻，气道挛急所致。临床以突发呼吸急促，喉中哮鸣有声，不得平卧，发作前可见鼻痒、喷嚏，咳嗽、胸闷等先兆症状为特征的反复发作性肺系病。

V009-N00206.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V009-N00206.label: 哮病
V009-N00206.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜肺病
V009-N00206.definition: 以发作性喉中哮鸣有声，呼吸困难，甚则喘息不得平卧等为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00206.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00206.label: 哮喘病
V009-N00206.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00206.definition: Characterized by recurrent episodes of difficulty breathing, wheezing and shortness of breath with an inability to lie flat. Contributing factors may include congenital deficiency or impaired functions of the lung, spleen and kidney. These factors may generate phlegm to obstruct the airway.

V009-N00206.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00206.label: 哮病
V009-N00206.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00206.definition: Characterized by sudden, whistling sounds with an inability to lie flat. Precursory symptoms may include an itchy nose, sneezing, cough and chest tightness. Contributing factors may include heredity, exposure to dust or irritant gas, exogenous pathogenic factors, fatigue, improper diet or emotions. These factors, coupled with pre-existing phlegm may cause phlegm qi to stagnate and obstruct the respiratory airways.

V009-N00206.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00206.label: 哮喘
V009-N00206.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V009-N00206.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00206.label: 哮病
V009-N00206.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V009-N00206.label: 哮病
V009-N00206.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜肺系疾病
V009-N00206.definition: 以发作性喉中哮鸣有声，呼吸 困难，甚则喘息不得平卧为主要表现的疾 病。

V009-N00206.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V009-N00206.label: 哮喘
V009-N00206.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肺病
V009-N00206.definition: 哮指呼吸喘促而喉间有哮鸣音；喘指呼吸困难，短促急迫，甚则张口抬肩，鼻翼煽动，不能平卧。哮必兼喘，喘不必兼哮。

V009-N00206.label: 哮病
V009-N00206.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病证
V009-N00206.definition: 是由于宿痰伏肺，遇诱因或感邪引触，以致痰阻气道，肺失肃降，气道挛急所致发作性的痰鸣气喘疾患。发作时喉中哮鸣有声，呼吸气促困难，甚则喘息不能平卧为主要表现。

V009-N00206.label: 喘证
V009-N00206.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病证
V009-N00206.definition: 是指由于感受外邪，痰浊内蕴，情志失调而致肺气上逆，失于宣降，或久病气虚，肾失摄纳，以呼吸困难，甚则张口抬肩，鼻翼煽动，不能平卧等为主要临床表现的一种常见病证。严重者可致喘脱。

V009-N00207.label: 喘病
V009-N00207.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病｜哮喘病

V009-N00207.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00207.label: 喘病
V009-N00207.path: GBT 16751.1-2023 中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病｜哮喘病
V009-N00207.definition: 因外感风寒邪热束肺，或痰浊壅肺，痰气交结，肃降无权，或因先天不足，久咳伤肺，肾不纳气等所致。临床以气短喘促，呼吸困难，稍动尤甚，甚则张口抬肩，鼻翼煽动，不得平卧，伴见咳嗽、痰多，胸闷、紫绀，胸高胁胀等为特征的肺系病。

V009-N00207.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V009-N00207.label: 喘病
V009-N00207.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜肺病
V009-N00207.definition: 以气短喘促等为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00207.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00207.label: 喘病
V009-N00207.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00207.definition: Characterized by shortness of breath, rapid breathing, and difficulty breathing that worsens upon exertion. In severe cases, breathing with an open mouth and elevated shoulder, nasal flaring and an inability to lie flat may be present. Associated symptoms may include cough with profuse phlegm, chest tightness, cyanosis, raised chest and distension in the subcostal region. Contributing factors may include heredity, exogenous pathogenic wind cold affecting the lung, turbid phlegm accumulating in the lung, chronic cough damaging lung qi or kidney failing to absorb qi.

V009-N00207.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00207.label: 喘证
V009-N00207.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V009-N00207.label: 喘病
V009-N00207.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜肺系疾病
V009-N00207.definition: 因久患肺系疾病或他脏病变影响，致肺气上 逆肃降无权，以气短喘促为主要表现的疾 病。

V009-N00207.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V009-N00207.label: 哮喘
V009-N00207.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肺病
V009-N00207.definition: 哮指呼吸喘促而喉间有哮鸣音；喘指呼吸困难，短促急迫，甚则张口抬肩，鼻翼煽动，不能平卧。哮必兼喘，喘不必兼哮。

V009-N00207.label: 喘证
V009-N00207.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病证
V009-N00207.definition: 是指由于感受外邪，痰浊内蕴，情志失调而致肺气上逆，失于宣降，或久病气虚，肾失摄纳，以呼吸困难，甚则张口抬肩，鼻翼煽动，不能平卧等为主要临床表现的一种常见病证。严重者可致喘脱。

V009-N00213.label: 肺痿
V009-N00213.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病

V009-N00213.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00213.label: 肺痿
V009-N00213.path: GBT 16751.1-2023 中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病
V009-N00213.definition: 因咳喘日久不愈，肺气受损，津液耗伤，使肺叶枯萎或痿弱不用所致。临床以气短，咯吐浊唾涎沫等为特征的慢性肺系病。

V009-N00213.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V009-N00213.label: 肺痿
V009-N00213.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜肺病
V009-N00213.definition: 肺叶枯萎不荣或痿弱不用，以胸憋气短，咯吐浊唾涎沫为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00213.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00213.label: 肺痿
V009-N00213.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00213.definition: Characterized by shortness of breath and cough with expectoration of turbid sputum. Often occurs when chronic cough damages lung qi, consumes fluids and results in withering or disuse of the lung lobes.

V009-N00213.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00213.label: 肺痿
V009-N00213.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V009-N00213.label: 肺痿
V009-N00213.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜肺系疾病
V009-N00213.definition: 肺叶枯萎不荣或痿弱不用，以胸憋气短、咯 吐浊唾诞沫为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00213.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V009-N00213.label: 肺痿
V009-N00213.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肺病
V009-N00213.definition: 因咳喘日久不愈，肺气受损，津液耗伤，致肺叶枯萎不荣或痿弱不用。以气短、咯吐浊唾涎沫为主要表现的内脏痿病类疾病。

V009-N00213.label: 肺痿
V009-N00213.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病证
V009-N00213.definition: 因咳喘日久不愈，肺气受损，津液耗伤，致肺叶枯萎不荣或痿弱不用。以气短，咯吐浊唾涎沫为主要表现的内脏痿病类疾病。

V009-N00212.label: 肺瘅
V009-N00212.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病

V009-N00212.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00212.label: 肺瘅
V009-N00212.path: GBT 16751.1-2023 中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病
V009-N00212.definition: 因邪热入肺，或脏腑瘅热及肺，痰热壅肺，肺失清肃所致。临床以咳嗽，痰黄而稠，或痰中夹血，口渴，可伴见潮热、寒热，胸胁肋痛，大便秘结，小便黄等为特征的肺系病。

V009-N00212.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V009-N00212.label: 肺热病
V009-N00212.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜肺病
V009-N00212.definition: 以骤起发热，咳嗽，烦渴，胸痛为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00212.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00212.label: 肺瘅
V009-N00212.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00212.definition: Characterized by cough with sticky, yellow phlegm or blood-stained sputum and thirst. Associated symptoms may include tidal fever, chills, pain in the subcostal region, constipation and yellow urine. Often occurs when pathogenic heat, heat of zang–fu organs or phlegm heat affect the dispersing and descending of lung qi.

V009-N00212.label: 肺热病
V009-N00212.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病证
V009-N00212.definition: 风热病毒犯肺，热壅肺气，肺失清肃。以骤起发热，咳嗽，烦渴，胸痛为主要表现的内脏瘅[热]病类疾病。

V009-N00214.label: 肺胀
V009-N00214.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病

V009-N00214.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00214.label: 肺胀
V009-N00214.path: GBT 16751.1-2023 中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病
V009-N00214.definition: 因肺咳、哮病久治不愈，肺气壅滞，久胀不敛，肺叶充胸胀廓所致。临床以胸廓膨胀，憋闷喘息，咳嗽、痰多，动辄气促，面色晦暗，唇舌紫绀，甚或喘脱，咯血，神昏等为特征的慢性肺系病。

V009-N00214.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V009-N00214.label: 肺胀
V009-N00214.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜肺病
V009-N00214.definition: 肺叶久胀不敛，以胸中胀闷，咳嗽咯痰，气短而喘，唇舌紫绀为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00214.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00214.label: 肺胀
V009-N00214.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00214.definition: Characterized by chest stuffiness or distension, cough with expectoration of sputum, shortness of breath and panting upon exertion. In severe cases, a raised chest, distention in the subcostal region and cyanosis of the lips and tongue may be present. Often occurs when chronic cough or wheezing causes lung qi to stagnate.

V009-N00214.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00214.label: 肺胀
V009-N00214.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V009-N00214.label: 肺胀
V009-N00214.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜肺系疾病
V009-N00214.definition: 肺叶久胀不敛，以胸中胀闷，咳嗽咯痰，气短 而喘，唇舌紫绀为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00214.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V009-N00214.label: 肺胀
V009-N00214.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肺病
V009-N00214.definition: 常继发于肺咳、哮病等之后，因肺气长期壅滞，肺叶恒久膨胀、不能敛降，而胀廓充胸。以胸中胀闷、咳嗽咯痰、气短而喘为主要表现的肺系疾病。

V009-N00214.label: 肺胀
V009-N00214.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病证
V009-N00214.definition: 是指多种慢性肺系疾患反复发作，迁延不愈，肺脾肾三脏虚损，从而导致肺管不利，肺气壅滞，气道不畅，胸膺胀满不能敛降。临床表现见喘息气促，咳嗽，咯痰，胸部膨满，憋闷如塞，或唇甲紫绀，心悸浮肿等症。重者可出现昏迷、喘脱等危重证候。

V009-N00217.label: 关格
V009-N00217.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病

V009-N00217.label: 肠结
V009-N00217.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V009-N00217.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00217.label: 关格
V009-N00217.path: GBT 16751.1-2023 中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病
V009-N00217.definition: 因水肿、癃闭、淋病等晚期，脾肾阴阳衰惫，气化不利，湿浊毒邪上攻犯胃，或化热动风，甚或上蒙清空所致。临床以小便不通与呕吐不止并见，伴见皮肤瘙痒，口中臭秽，或有尿味，甚或手足搐搦，昏睡，神识不清等为特征的肾系病重症。

V009-N00217.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00217.label: 肠结
V009-N00217.path: GBT 16751.1-2023 中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病
V009-N00217.definition: 因腹部手术损伤，或因肿瘤压迫、癌毒积聚等，致使肠道痹阻，气机闭结所致。临床以腹部阵发性绞痛，腹胀，频繁呕吐，无肠鸣、矢气，大便闭结等为特征的脾系病重症。

V009-N00217.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V009-N00217.label: 关格
V009-N00217.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜肾膀胱病
V009-N00217.definition: 关于格的合称。以小便不通（关）于呕吐不止（格）并见为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00217.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V009-N00217.label: 肠结
V009-N00217.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜脾胃病
V009-N00217.definition: 以腹胀如鼓，腹痛，呕吐，便秘，无肠鸣，矢气为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00217.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00217.label: 关格
V009-N00217.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00217.definition: A critical condition characterized by urinary retention and persistent vomiting, coupled with skin itching, and a strong-odoured breath. In severe cases, convulsions of the hands and feet, drowsiness and mental cloudiness may be present. Often occurs in late-stage oedema, urinary retention or strangury. Contributing factors may include impaired qi transformation due to yin/yang failure of the spleen and kidney and toxic, turbid dampness attacking the stomach. Alternatively, it may also occur when dampness transforms into heat and stirs wind, or in severe cases, to disturb the heart mind.

V009-N00217.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00217.label: 肠结
V009-N00217.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00217.definition: Characterized by paroxysmal abdominal colic, abdominal bloating, absence of bowel sounds, flatus, and constipation. Often occurs when abdominal surgery, tumour compression or carcinoma toxins obstruct the flow of intestinal qi.

V009-N00217.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00217.label: 关格
V009-N00217.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V009-N00217.label: 关格
V009-N00217.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜肾膀胱疾病
V009-N00217.definition: 以小便不通与呕吐并见为主要表现的疾病。 小便不通称为关，呕吐不止称为格。

V009-N00217.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V009-N00217.label: 关格
V009-N00217.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肾病
V009-N00217.definition: 以小便不通与呕吐并见为主要表现的疾病。小便不通称为关，呕吐不止称为格。

V009-N00217.label: 关格
V009-N00217.path: 临床术语｜原理和经验｜原理｜诊断原理｜异常脉象
V009-N00217.definition: 指脉象。指人迎与寸口脉俱盛极，系阴阳离决的危象。;是病证名。小便不通与呕吐不止并见的病证。小便不通名关，呕吐不已名格。;是病理名。指阴阳均偏盛，不能相互营运的严重病理情况。

V009-N00217.label: 关格
V009-N00217.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证
V009-N00217.definition: 是指由于脾肾阴阳衰惫，气化不利，浊邪内蕴而致小便不通与呕吐并见的病证。多见于水肿、癃闭、淋证等病的晚期。

V009-N00217.label: 肠结
V009-N00217.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V009-N00217.definition: 多因腹部手术损伤，或实邪内积，使肠体活动异常而搏结不通，气机阻塞所致。以腹痛、呕吐，腹胀，便秘为主要表现的内脏痹病类疾病。

V009-N00219.label: 尿崩
V009-N00219.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病

V009-N00219.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00219.label: 尿崩
V009-N00219.path: GBT 16751.1-2023 中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病
V009-N00219.definition: 因肾虚不固，或脑病及肾，气化失约，水津直趋膀胱而下泄所致。临床以尿多如崩，尿清如水，烦渴、多饮等为特征的肾系病。

V009-N00219.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V009-N00219.label: 尿崩
V009-N00219.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜肾膀胱病
V009-N00219.definition: 以尿多如崩，尿清如水，烦渴多饮为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00219.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00219.label: 尿崩
V009-N00219.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00219.definition: Characterized by large amounts of dilute urine and excessive thirst. Often occurs when the kidney fails to perform the qi transformation of the urinary bladder.

V009-N00219.label: 尿崩
V009-N00219.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜肾膀胱疾病
V009-N00219.definition: 以尿多如崩，尿清如水，烦渴多饮为主要表 现的肾系疾病。

V009-N00219.label: 尿崩
V009-N00219.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证
V009-N00219.definition: 因肾虚下元不固，或脑神等病变及肾，肾之气化失司，水津直趋膀胱而下泄。以尿多如崩，尿清如水，烦渴多饮为主要表现的肾系疾病。

V009-N00233.label: 强中病
V009-N00233.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病

V009-N00233.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00233.label: 强中病
V009-N00233.path: GBT 16751.1-2023 中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病
V009-N00233.definition: 因肝火、瘀阻、湿热下注，或滥用壮阳药，火毒内盛，引动相火，或色欲过度，肾阴亏耗，虚阳妄动等所致。临床以阴茎挺举，持久不倒等为特征的肾系病。

V009-N00233.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00233.label: 强中
V009-N00233.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00233.definition: Characterized by abnormally prolonged erection of the penis. Contributing factors may include liver fire, stasis, damp heat, overuse of aphrodisiac drugs or sexual indulgence. These factors may cause internal toxic fire and trigger ministerial fire to consume kidney yang and result in hyperactivity of deficiency yang.

V009-N00233.label: 阳强
V009-N00233.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜肾膀胱疾病
V009-N00233.definition: 以阴茎久举不痿，精液自泄为主要表现的疾 病。

V009-N00233.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V009-N00233.label: 阴茎异常勃起
V009-N00233.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医男科病
V009-N00233.definition: 指阴茎久举不痿、精液自泄为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00233.label: 阳强
V009-N00233.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜泌尿、男性前阴病
V009-N00233.definition: 以阴茎久举不痿，精液自泄为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00235.label: 淋证
V009-N00235.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病

V009-N00235.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00235.label: 淋证
V009-N00235.path: GBT 16751.1-2023 中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病
V009-N00235.definition: 泛指因湿热侵袭或蕴结下焦，或脾肾亏虚、肝郁气滞，或因痨虫、结石、岩瘤等，致使膀胱气化不利而引起，以小便频数涩痛、痛引腰腹等为特征的一类疾病。

V009-N00235.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V009-N00235.label: 淋证
V009-N00235.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜肾膀胱病
V009-N00235.definition: 以小便频急，淋漓不尽，尿道涩痛，小腹拘急，痛引腰腹为主要表现的疾病的统称。注：包括热淋、石淋、气淋、血淋、膏淋、劳淋等。

V009-N00235.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00235.label: 淋证
V009-N00235.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00235.definition: Characterized by frequent, urgent, hesitant and painful urination. The pain during urination may radiate to the low back and abdomen. Contributing factors may include damp heat affecting the lower jiao, deficiency of the spleen and kidney, liver qi stagnation, tuberculosis, stones or tumours. These factors may impair the qi transformation of the urinary bladder.

V009-N00235.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00235.label: 淋证
V009-N00235.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V009-N00235.label: 淋证
V009-N00235.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜肾膀胱疾病
V009-N00235.definition: 以小便频急，淋沥不尽，尿道涩痛，小腹拘 急，痛引腰腹为主要表现的疾病的统称。

V009-N00235.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V009-N00235.label: 淋证
V009-N00235.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肾病
V009-N00235.definition: 以小便频急、淋沥不尽、尿道涩痛、小腹拘急、痛引腰腹为主要表现的疾病的统称。

V009-N00235.label: 淋证
V009-N00235.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证
V009-N00235.definition: 是因肾、膀胱气化失司、水道不利而致的以小便频急、淋沥不尽、尿道涩痛、小腹拘急、痛引腰腹为主要临床表现的一类病证。

V009-N00238.label: 热淋
V009-N00238.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病｜淋证

V009-N00238.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00238.label: 热淋
V009-N00238.path: GBT 16751.1-2023 中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病｜淋证
V009-N00238.definition: 因湿热等邪客肾，蕴积膀胱所致。临床以小便频数、短赤，尿道灼热、涩痛，伴见寒热，腰痛，少腹拘急胀痛，舌苔黄腻，脉滑数等为特征的急性发作性淋证。

V009-N00238.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V009-N00238.label: 热淋
V009-N00238.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜肾膀胱病｜淋证
V009-N00238.definition: 以起病急，尿频，尿急，尿道灼热涩痛，尿黄为主要表现的淋证。

V009-N00238.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00238.label: 热淋
V009-N00238.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00238.definition: Characterized by frequent, urgent and painful urination with scanty, red urine and a burning sensation. Associated symptoms may include fever, chills, lower back painlower back pain, lower abdominal cramps, distension and pain, a yellow, greasy tongue coating and a slippery, rapid pulse. Often occurs when damp heat affects the kidney and urinary bladder.

V009-N00238.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00238.label: 热淋
V009-N00238.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V009-N00238.label: 热淋
V009-N00238.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜肾膀胱疾病
V009-N00238.definition: 以起病急，尿频，尿急，尿道灼热涩痛，尿黄 为主要表现的淋证。

V009-N00238.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V009-N00238.label: 热淋
V009-N00238.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肾病｜淋证
V009-N00238.definition: 因染受湿热之邪，使膀胱气化不利，以引起尿频、尿痛、尿急、尿血为主要表现的淋病类疾病。

V009-N00238.label: 热淋
V009-N00238.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证｜淋证
V009-N00238.definition: 因染受湿热之邪，使膀胱气化不利。以新起尿频，尿痛，尿急，尿血为主要表现的淋病类疾病。

V009-N00239.label: 石淋
V009-N00239.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病｜淋证

V009-N00239.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00239.label: 石淋
V009-N00239.path: GBT 16751.1-2023 中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病｜淋证
V009-N00239.definition: 因湿热之邪蕴积下焦，煎熬尿浊杂质，结为砂石，停阻于肾系所致。临床以尿出砂石，或经检查发现结石，尿道窘迫疼痛，腰腹剧烈绞痛，或伴见尿血，影像学检查结石征象等为特征的淋证。

V009-N00239.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V009-N00239.label: 石淋
V009-N00239.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜肾膀胱病｜淋证
V009-N00239.definition: 以小便排出砂石为主症，或排尿时突然中断，尿道窘迫疼痛，腰腹绞痛难忍为主要表现的淋证。

V009-N00239.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00239.label: 石淋
V009-N00239.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00239.definition: Characterized by lower back painlower back pain, haematuria or discharge of stones, coupled with positive imaging findings of urinary stones. Often occurs when damp heat scorches the urine into stones.

V009-N00239.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00239.label: 石淋
V009-N00239.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V009-N00239.label: 石淋
V009-N00239.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜肾膀胱疾病
V009-N00239.definition: 以小便排出砂石为主症，或排尿时突然中 断，尿道窘迫疼痛，腰腹绞痛难忍为主要表 现的淋证。

V009-N00239.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V009-N00239.label: 石淋
V009-N00239.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肾病｜淋证
V009-N00239.definition: 因湿热之邪蕴结下焦，煎熬尿浊杂质，结为砂石，停阻于肾系。以腰痛、尿血，或尿出砂石。

V009-N00239.label: 石淋
V009-N00239.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证｜淋证
V009-N00239.definition: 因湿热之邪蕴结下焦，煎熬尿浊杂质，结尾砂石，停阻于肾系。以腰痛，尿血，或尿出砂石，或经检查发现结石为特征的结石类疾病。

V009-N00229.label: 癃闭
V009-N00229.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病

V009-N00229.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00229.label: 癃闭
V009-N00229.path: GBT 16751.1-2023 中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病
V009-N00229.definition: 因湿热下注，或瘀血、败精、结石、肿瘤等阻塞膀胱、尿道，或因肾阳不足、气化无权，肾阴亏损、津液内耗，以及阴部手术等所致。临床以小便量少或点滴而出，甚至闭塞不通，小腹胀痛等为特征的肾系病。

V009-N00229.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V009-N00229.label: 癃闭
V009-N00229.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜肾膀胱病
V009-N00229.definition: 以小便量少，点滴而出，甚至闭塞不通为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00229.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00229.label: 癃闭
V009-N00229.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00229.definition: Characterized by scanty urine, dripping urination and lower abdominal distension/pain. In severe cases, individuals may experience an inability to empty the bladder. Contributing factors may include damp heat in the urinary bladder, stagnant blood, stones or tumours obstructing the urethra, kidney yang failing to perform qi transformation, kidney yin deficiency or surgery.

V009-N00229.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00229.label: 癃闭
V009-N00229.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V009-N00229.label: 癃闭
V009-N00229.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜肾膀胱疾病
V009-N00229.definition: 以小便量少，点滴而出，甚至闭塞不通为主 要表现的疾病。

V009-N00229.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V009-N00229.label: 癃闭
V009-N00229.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肾病
V009-N00229.definition: 因败精阻塞、阴部手术等，使膀胱气化失司，水道不利，以小便量少、点滴而出、甚至闭塞不通为主要表现的内脏痹病类疾病。

V009-N00229.label: 癃闭
V009-N00229.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证
V009-N00229.definition: 是由于肾和膀胱气化失司而导致尿量减少，排尿困难，甚则小便闭塞不通主症的一种病证。其中又以小便不利，点滴而短少，病势较缓者称为“癃”；以小便闭塞，点滴全无，病势较急者称为“闭”。癃和闭虽有区别，但都是指排尿困难，只有程度上的不同，因此多合称为癃闭。

V009-N00229.label: 小便不通
V009-N00229.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜二便症状｜小便症状
V009-N00229.definition: 小便排出困难，严重者点滴难出的表现。

V009-N00229.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V009-N00229.label: 小便难
V009-N00229.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜问诊类

V009-N00231.label: 遗尿病
V009-N00231.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病

V009-N00231.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00231.label: 遗尿病
V009-N00231.path: GBT 16751.1-2023 中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病

V009-N00231.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00231.label: 遗尿
V009-N00231.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00231.definition: Characterized by repeated inability to control urination during sleep. Contributing factors may include congenital weakness, kidney qi deficiency or internal retention of damp heat and stagnant blood. These factors may impair the qi transformation of the urinary bladder.

V009-N00231.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00231.label: 遗尿
V009-N00231.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜儿科病

V009-N00231.label: 遗尿病
V009-N00231.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜儿科疾病
V009-N00231.definition: 以小儿入睡后尿液不随意地流出为主要表 现的疾病。

V009-N00231.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V009-N00231.label: 遗尿
V009-N00231.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肾病
V009-N00231.definition: 因禀赋不足，肾气不固，或湿热瘀血内蕴，膀胱失约。以入睡后尿液不随意地流出为主要表现的肾系疾病。

V009-N00231.label: 遗尿
V009-N00231.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证
V009-N00231.definition: 是指睡中小便自遗，醒后方觉的一种病证。发病与元气不足，肺、脾、肾功能失调有关。

V009-N00231.label: 遗尿
V009-N00231.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜二便症状｜小便症状
V009-N00231.definition: 睡眠或昏迷中不自觉地发生排尿的表现。

V009-N00231.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V009-N00231.label: 遗尿
V009-N00231.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜问诊类
V009-N00231.definition: involuntary discharge of urine during sleep

V009-N00244.label: 噎膈病
V009-N00244.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V009-N00244.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00244.label: 噎膈病
V009-N00244.path: GBT 16751.1-2023 中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病
V009-N00244.definition: 因忧思不解，痰气凝结，以及火郁或血瘀、津枯、癌毒等致使食道梗阻所致。临床以吞咽不顺，食入即吐，或饮食梗阻不下等为特征的脾系病。

V009-N00244.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V009-N00244.label: 噎膈
V009-N00244.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜脾胃病
V009-N00244.definition: 以吞咽不利，饮食梗塞难下为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00244.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00244.label: 噎膈病
V009-N00244.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00244.definition: Characterized by difficulty in swallowing, vomiting immediately after eating food or inability to swallow solid food (a feeling of food stuck or held up before it either passes into the stomach or is regurgitated). Often occurs when phlegm qi stagnation (plum pit qi), stagnant fire, blood stasis or cancer toxin obstructs the oesophagus.

V009-N00244.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00244.label: 噎膈
V009-N00244.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V009-N00244.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00244.label: 吞食梗塞
V009-N00244.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V009-N00244.label: 噎膈
V009-N00244.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜脾胃疾病
V009-N00244.definition: 以吞咽不顺，饮食梗塞难下为主要表现的疾 病。

V009-N00244.label: 吞食梗塞
V009-N00244.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V009-N00244.definition: 吞咽食物时梗噎不顺，甚或隔阻不通的表现。

V009-N00244.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V009-N00244.label: 噎膈
V009-N00244.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜脾胃病
V009-N00244.definition: 吞咽不顺、饮食梗塞难下的症状，常见于食管病变。

V009-N00244.label: 噎膈
V009-N00244.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V009-N00244.definition: 由七情内伤、酒食不节、久病年老致气痰瘀交阻，津气耗伤，胃失通降而发本病。症见吞咽食物哽咽不顺，饮食难下，或食而复出的疾患。

V009-N00244.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V009-N00244.label: 吞食梗塞
V009-N00244.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜问诊类
V009-N00244.definition: difficulty or even inability to swallow

V009-N00248.label: 肠痈
V009-N00248.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V009-N00248.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00248.label: 肠痈
V009-N00248.path: GBT 16751.1-2023 中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病
V009-N00248.definition: 因热毒内聚、淤结于肠道，肉腐成脓所致。临床以发热，右少腹疼痛拘急，腹部压痛拒按，或触及包块等为特征的脾系病。

V009-N00248.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V009-N00248.label: 肠痈
V009-N00248.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第2部分 外科学｜其他[外科学]｜内痈

V009-N00248.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00248.label: 肠痈
V009-N00248.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00248.definition: Characterized by fever, right lower abdominal pain and contracture, abdominal tenderness or palpable lumps. Often results from toxic heat accumulating in the intestines.

V009-N00248.label: 肠痈
V009-N00248.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜外科疾病｜外科其他疾病
V009-N00248.definition: 以发热，右少腹疼痛拘急，或触及包块为主 要表现的疾病。

V009-N00248.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V009-N00248.label: 肠痈
V009-N00248.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医外科疾病｜疮疡｜痈
V009-N00248.definition: 因热毒内聚，淤结肠中，而生痈成脓。以发热、右少腹疼痛拘急，或触及包块为主要表现的内脏痈病类疾病。

V009-N00248.label: 肠痈
V009-N00248.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜其他外科疾病
V009-N00248.definition: 因热毒内聚，淤结肠中，而生痈成脓。以发热，右少腹疼痛拘急，或触及包块为主要表现的内脏痈病类疾病。

V009-N00248.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V009-N00248.label: 肠痈
V009-N00248.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜临床各科｜外科
V009-N00248.definition: a localized pyogenic inflammation of the intestine, referring to acute appendicitis

V009-N00249.label: 胃胀病
V009-N00249.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V009-N00249.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00249.label: 胃胀病
V009-N00249.path: GBT 16751.1-2023 中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病
V009-N00249.definition: 因胃病日久，脾胃失健，或湿浊痰瘀内蕴，阻滞气机所致。临床以长期脘腹痞胀作痛，嘈杂、噫酸，或伴见浮肿等为特征的慢性脾系病。

V009-N00249.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V009-N00249.label: 胃痞
V009-N00249.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜脾胃病
V009-N00249.definition: 以胃脘部痞塞、满闷不舒，触之无形，按之柔软、压之无痛，纳食减少为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00249.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00249.label: 胃胀病
V009-N00249.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00249.definition: Characterized by persistent stomach stuffiness, distension, pain and discomfort. Associated symptoms include acid reflux and oedema. Often results from dysfunctional spleen and stomach or internal turbid phlegm obstructing the flow of qi.

V009-N00249.label: 胃胀
V009-N00249.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V009-N00249.definition: 因胃病日久，脾胃失健，或湿浊痰瘀内蕴，阻滞气机所致。以长期脘腹痞胀作痛、嘈杂，或有浮肿等为主要表现的内脏胀[著]病类疾病。

V009-N00249.label: 心下痞
V009-N00249.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜痞满
V009-N00249.definition: 自觉心下胃脘部满闷堵塞、按之却柔软不痛的表现。

V009-N00108.label: 鼻渊
V009-N00108.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜鼻病类术语

V009-N00108.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00108.label: 鼻渊
V009-N00108.path: GBT 16751.1-2023 中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病｜鼻病类术语
V009-N00108.definition: 因外邪侵袭，或脏腑蕴热，蒸灼鼻窍，或因脏腑虚损，邪留鼻窦所致。临床以鼻流浊涕，量多不止，鼻塞，嗅觉减退，或鼻道有脓，可伴见头晕胀闷等为特征的鼻病。

V009-N00108.label: 鼻渊
V009-N00108.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第9部分 耳鼻喉科学｜鼻病（总）
V009-N00108.definition: 以鼻部浊涕，量多不止为主要表现的鼻病。

V009-N00108.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00108.label: 鼻渊
V009-N00108.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00108.definition: Characterized by thick nasal mucus, nasal obstruction, decreased sensitivity to smell. Individuals may also experience pus discharge, dizziness and head distension. If often results from contraction of exogenous pathogens, retained heat in the zang–fu organs, or deficiency of the zang–fu organs.

V009-N00108.definition: 因外邪侵袭，或脏腑蕴热，蒸灼鼻窍，或因脏腑虚损，邪留鼻窦所致。以鼻流浊涕量多、鼻塞、嗅觉减退、头晕胀闷、鼻道有脓等为主要表现的鼻病。

V009-N00109.label: 鼻鼽
V009-N00109.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜鼻病类术语

V009-N00109.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00109.label: 鼻鼽
V009-N00109.path: GBT 16751.1-2023 中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病｜鼻病类术语
V009-N00109.definition: 因禀质特异，脏腑虚损，兼感外邪，或感受花粉、粉尘及不洁之气所致。临床以突然或反复的鼻痒，喷嚏频作，鼻流清涕如水，鼻塞等为特征的鼻病。

V009-N00109.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语

V009-N00109.definition: 以突然和反复发作的鼻痒、喷嚏、流清涕、比赛等为主要表现的鼻病。

V009-N00109.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00109.label: 鼻鼽
V009-N00109.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00109.definition: Characterized by sudden or recurrent nasal itching, sneezing, and runny or stuffy nose. Often results from genetic factors, deficiency of the zang–fu organs coupled with contraction of exogenous pathogens, or exposure to pollen, dust or polluted air.

V009-N00109.definition: 以突然和反复发作的鼻痒、喷嚏、流清涕、鼻塞等为主要表现的鼻病。

V009-N00109.label: 鼻鼽

V009-N00109.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医五官科疾病｜中医耳鼻咽喉科疾病｜中医鼻疾病

V009-N00262.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜八纲证候类术语
V009-N00262.definition: 与虚证相对。泛指外邪侵袭人体，或因情志、食积、痰饮、水湿、瘀血等引起气血、阴阳、脏腑、经络功能亢进，邪气壅滞或炽盛等相应征象为特征的一类证候。

V009-N00262.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00262.label: 实证
V009-N00262.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V009-N00262.definition: Characterized by high fever, thirst, chest tightness, panting, rapid breathing, phlegm sounds in the throat, restlessness, delirium, abdominal distension/pain/tenderness, and scanty, dark-yellow urine or hesitant, painful urination. The tongue is rough with a dry, yellow coating. The pulse is replete and forceful. Contributing factors may include six pathogenic factors, parasites or dysfunctions of the zang–fu organs (subsequent food stagnation, retention of phlegm/fluid/water/dampness and blood stasis).

V009-N00262.label: 实证
V009-N00262.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V009-N00262.definition: 外邪侵犯人体，或是脏腑机能失调，痰饮、水湿、积气瘀血、宿食、燥屎、脓、虫、砂石等有形之物停积体内，导致各种邪气盛实的证候。

V009-N00262.label: 实证
V009-N00262.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜虚实证候
V009-N00262.definition: 在疾病过程中，以邪气亢盛为主要的矛盾方面，邪正相搏所产生的比较激烈的病理反应。临床表现为身热烦躁、胸闷气粗、痰涎壅盛、脘腹胀痛拒按、大便秘结或暴泻、里急后重、小便不利或淋沥涩痛、甚则狂乱、神昏谵语、舌质苍老、舌苔厚腻、脉实有力。

V009-N00264.definition: 寒证的表现与热证的表现同时互见，或上下寒热交错，或表里寒热交错等的证候。

V009-N00485.label: 表寒肺热证
V009-N00485.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜八纲证候类术语｜寒热错杂证｜表寒里热证

V009-N00485.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V009-N00485.label: 表寒肺热证
V009-N00485.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜八纲证候类术语｜寒热错杂证｜表寒里热证
V009-N00485.definition: 因寒邪外束，肺热内郁所致。临床以咳嗽或喘，咯痰黄白，胸闷，烦躁，舌苔白或微黄，脉浮数，伴见恶寒、发热，无汗，头身疼痛等为特征的证候。

V009-N00485.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00485.label: 表寒肺热证
V009-N00485.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V009-N00485.definition: Characterized by aversion to cold, fever, thirst, absence of sweating, restlessness, cough, panting and chest tightness. The tongue coating is yellow mixed with white. The pulse is superficial and rapid. This pattern often occurs when cold binds the Wei-defence and causes internal lung heat.

V009-N00485.label: 表寒肺热证
V009-N00485.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜肺和大肠证候｜肺系证候
V009-N00485.definition: 寒邪外束，肺热内郁，以恶寒发热，口渴，无汗，烦躁，咳嗽气喘，胸闷，苔黄白，脉浮数等为常见症的证候。

V009-N00265.label: 寒证
V009-N00265.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜八纲证候类术语

V009-N00265.label: 寒证
V009-N00265.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜八纲证候类术语
V009-N00265.definition: 与热证相对。泛指外感寒邪，或因阳气不足，阴气过盛等而引起寒凝肌表、经络、骨节，或脏腑虚寒、寒实等相应征象为特征的一类证候。

V009-N00265.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00265.label: 寒证
V009-N00265.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V009-N00265.definition: Characterized by aversion to cold, cold intolerance, cold pain with preference for warmth, absence of thirst, thin, clear phlegm and nasal discharge, clear, profuse urine, loose stools and a pale complexion. The tongue is purple with a white coating. The pulse is tight or slow. Often results from excess of yin qi or cold attacking the interior.

V009-N00265.label: 寒证
V009-N00265.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V009-N00265.label: 寒证
V009-N00265.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V009-N00265.definition: 寒邪侵袭，或阳虚阴盛，以恶寒，或畏寒，肢冷喜暖，口淡不渴，面白踡卧，分泌物、排泄物清稀，舌淡苔白，脉紧或迟等为常见症的寒性征候。

V009-N00265.definition: 由阴盛或阳虚所产生的以寒冷表现为主的一类证候。临床表现为恶寒或畏寒喜暖、面色晄白、肢冷蜷卧、口淡不渴，或痰、涎、涕稀量多，小便清长，大便稀溏，舌淡苔白而润滑，脉迟或紧等。

V009-N00265.label: 寒证
V009-N00265.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜寒热证候
V009-N00265.definition: 由阴盛或阳虚所产生的以寒冷表现为主的一类证候。临床表现为恶寒或畏寒喜暖、面色晄白、肢冷蜷卧、口淡不渴，或痰、涎、涕稀量多，小便清长，大便稀溏，舌淡苔白而润滑，脉迟或紧等。

V009-N00267.definition: 与寒证相对。泛指外感热邪，或诸邪入里化热，或因阴虚阳亢等而引起邪热袭表、经气痹阻，或邪入脏腑经络，阳气亢盛、阴津亏损等相应征象为特征的一类证候。

V009-N00267.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00267.label: 热证
V009-N00267.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V009-N00267.definition: Characterized by fever, a red face, thirst, constipation and yellow or red urine. Alternatively, malar flush, night sweats, feverish sensations in the palms, soles and chest, a dry, red tongue and a thready, rapid pulse may be present. It is sub-categorized into patterns of exterior heat, interior heat, deficiency heat and excess heat. Often results from contracting pathogenic heat or hyperactivity of yang due to yin deficiency.

V009-N00267.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00267.label: 热盛动风
V009-N00267.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜病机

V009-N00267.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00267.label: 热证
V009-N00267.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V009-N00267.label: 热证
V009-N00267.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V009-N00267.definition: 热邪侵袭，或阳气亢盛，以身热烦躁，面目红赤，唇红而干，咽燥口渴，喜冷饮，大便秘结，小便短赤，舌红苔黄，脉数等为常见症的热性证候。

V009-N00267.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V009-N00267.label: 热证
V009-N00267.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜寒热证候
V009-N00267.definition: 由阳盛或阴虚所产生的以温热表现为主的一类证候，临床表现为发热恶热，喜冷，口渴喜冷饮，面红目赤，烦躁昏谵，或痰、涕黄稠，或吐血衄血，小便短赤，大便干结，舌红苔燥，脉滑数等。

V009-N00267.label: 热胜则肿
V009-N00267.path: 临床术语｜病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜寒热失调｜热的病机｜实热
V009-N00267.definition: 指热邪炽盛，蕴郁肌肤，导致痈肿疮疡的病理变化。

V009-N00267.label: 热极生风
V009-N00267.path: 临床术语｜病因病机｜病机｜内生五邪病机｜风气内动
V009-N00267.definition: 指邪热炽盛，伤及营血，燔灼肝经，筋脉失养而挛急抽搐的病理变化。

V009-N00267.label: 血热妄行
V009-N00267.path: 临床术语｜病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜血失调｜血热
V009-N00267.definition: 指血分热盛而动血耗血，或血脉受热而不能壅遏营血，导致出血的病机。

V009-N00267.label: 上焦热胜
V009-N00267.path: 临床术语｜病因病机｜病机｜脏腑病机｜心包与三焦病机｜三焦病机｜上焦病机

V009-N00267.label: 热证
V009-N00267.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜寒热证候
V009-N00267.definition: 由阳盛或阴虚所产生的以温热表现为主的一类证候，临床表现为发热恶热，喜冷，口渴喜冷饮，面红目赤，烦躁昏谵，或痰、涕黄稠，或吐血衄血，小便短赤，大便干结，舌红苔燥，脉滑数等。

V009-N00267.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V009-N00267.label: 热证
V009-N00267.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜八纲辨证
V009-N00267.definition: a general term for patterns/syndromes resulting either from attack of external heat or from prevalence of yang qi, usually manifested by fever, aversion to heat and liking for cold, thirst, flushed face, irritability and vexation, thick yellow sputum

V009-N00269.label: 虚证
V009-N00269.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜八纲证候类术语

V009-N00269.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V009-N00269.label: 虚证
V009-N00269.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜八纲证候类术语
V009-N00269.definition: 与实证相对。泛指因正气不足，人体气血津精阴阳虚损而引起气血、阴阳、脏腑、经络功能衰退等相应征象为特征的一类证候。注：包括阴虚、阳虚、气虚、血虚及脏腑经络等虚证。

V009-N00269.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00269.label: 虚证
V009-N00269.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V009-N00269.definition: Characterized by general weakness, a weak pulse and abdominal softness. Often results from insufficiency of qi, yin, yang or blood.

V009-N00269.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00269.label: 虚证
V009-N00269.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V009-N00269.label: 虚证
V009-N00269.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V009-N00269.definition: 先天禀赋不足，或后天失调，或疾病损伤等所致正气虚弱的证候，有阳虚证、阴虚证、气虚证、血虚证之分。

V009-N00269.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V009-N00269.label: 虚证
V009-N00269.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜虚实证候
V009-N00269.definition: 在疾病过程中，以正气虚弱为矛盾的主要方面，正邪斗争所产生的较和缓的病理反应。

V009-N00269.label: 虚证
V009-N00269.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜虚实证候
V009-N00269.definition: 先天禀赋不足，或后天失调，或疾病损伤等所致正气虚弱的证候，有阳虚证、阴虚证、气虚证、血虚证之分。

V009-N00269.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V009-N00269.label: 虚证
V009-N00269.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜八纲辨证
V009-N00269.definition: a general term for patterns/syndromes caused by deficiency of the healthy qi (including deficiency of yin, yang, qi and blood)

V009-N00270.label: 表证
V009-N00270.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜八纲证候类术语

V009-N00270.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V009-N00270.label: 表证
V009-N00270.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜八纲证候类术语
V009-N00270.definition: 与里证相对。泛指外感病邪侵袭肌肤、肌肉、骨节、官窍等体表组织而引起营卫不和、经气不利等相应征象为特征的一类证候。

V009-N00270.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00270.label: 表证
V009-N00270.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V009-N00270.definition: Characterized by aversion to wind/cold, fever, headache, and body aches. The tongue coating is thin. The pulse is floating. These signs and symptoms are often seen in the early stage of externally contracted conditions that have a sudden onset, superficial location and a short duration. Often occurs when exogenous pathogenic factors affect the interstices, joints and head.

V009-N00270.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00270.label: 表证
V009-N00270.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V009-N00270.label: 表证
V009-N00270.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V009-N00270.definition: 外感病的初期，起病较急，病位较浅，病情较轻，病程较短，以发热恶寒或恶风、头身痛、舌苔薄白、脉浮为常见症的证候。

V009-N00270.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V009-N00270.label: 表证
V009-N00270.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜表里证候
V009-N00270.definition: 外感邪气经皮毛、口鼻侵入人体，正气（卫气）抗邪而表现于体表的轻浅证候。临床表现为发热恶寒（可恶风）、头身疼痛、舌苔薄白、脉浮。

V009-N00270.label: 表证
V009-N00270.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜表里证候
V009-N00270.definition: 是指六淫，疫疠，虫毒等邪气经皮毛，口鼻侵入机体，正气（卫气）抗邪所表现轻浅证候的概括。表证主要见于外感疾病初期阶段。

V009-N00270.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V009-N00270.label: 表证
V009-N00270.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜八纲辨证
V009-N00270.definition: a general term for patterns/syndromes that occur chiefly at the early stage of external contractions affecting the exterior part of the body, characterized by a sudden onset, aversion to cold or to wind, fever, headache, generalized pain, thin tongue

V009-N00271.label: 里证
V009-N00271.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜八纲证候类术语

V009-N00271.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V009-N00271.label: 里证
V009-N00271.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜八纲证候类术语
V009-N00271.definition: 与表证相对。泛指外邪由表入里，或因饮食不节、劳倦过度、七情内伤、痰瘀凝滞等而引起气血、阴阳、脏腑经络功能失调等相应征象为特征的一类证候。

V009-N00271.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00271.label: 里证
V009-N00271.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V009-N00271.definition: A group of patterns caused by entering of external pathogens into the interior, improper diet, over exhaustion, emotional disturbance or phlegm stasis, resulting in disorders and dysfunctions in qi, blood, yin, yang, zang–fu organs and meridian systems.

V009-N00271.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00271.label: 里证
V009-N00271.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V009-N00271.label: 里证
V009-N00271.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V009-N00271.definition: 病邪深入于脏腑、气血、骨髓所致，病位深，病情重，病程长的证候。

V009-N00271.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V009-N00271.label: 里证
V009-N00271.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜表里证候
V009-N00271.definition: 泛指病变部位在内，病邪深入于脏腑、气血、骨髓所致，病位深、病情重、病程长的证候。

V009-N00271.label: 里证
V009-N00271.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜表里证候
V009-N00271.definition: 泛指病变部位在内，病邪深入于脏腑、气血、骨髓所致，病位深、病情重、病程长的证候。        >> 隐藏详细信息

V009-N00271.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V009-N00271.label: 里证
V009-N00271.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜八纲辨证
V009-N00271.definition: a general term for patterns/syndromes that indicate the existence of disease in the interior of the body such as bowels and viscera, qi and blood, or bone marrow

V009-N00272.label: 阳证
V009-N00272.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜八纲证候类术语

V009-N00272.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V009-N00272.label: 阳证
V009-N00272.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜八纲证候类术语
V009-N00272.definition: 与阴证相对。泛指具有兴奋、趋外、上升、机能亢进或色泽明亮等病机特征，具有统领表证、热证、实证辨证意义的一类证候。

V009-N00272.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00272.label: 阳证
V009-N00272.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V009-N00272.definition: Causes outward, upward symptoms and manifests as conditions characterized by excitability, hyperactivity, restlessness, and brightness. It encompasses exterior pattern, heat pattern and excess pattern.

V009-N00272.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00272.label: 阳证
V009-N00272.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V009-N00272.label: 阳证
V009-N00272.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V009-N00272.definition: 符合阳的兴奋、躁动、亢进、快速等属性的证候，是对表证、实证、热证的概括。

V009-N00272.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V009-N00272.label: 阳证
V009-N00272.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候
V009-N00272.definition: 符合阳的兴奋、躁动、亢进、快速等属性的证候，是对表证、实证、热证的概括。

V009-N00272.label: 阳证
V009-N00272.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候
V009-N00272.definition: 符合阳的兴奋、躁动、亢进、快速等属性的证候，是对表证、实证、热证的概括。

V009-N00272.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V009-N00272.label: 阳证
V009-N00272.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜八纲辨证
V009-N00272.definition: a collective term for exterior, heat and excess patterns/ syndromes with excitatory, hyperfunctional, restless or bright manifestations, or outward and upward symptoms, as well as morbid conditions caused by pathogenic factors of yang nature

V009-N00273.label: 阴证
V009-N00273.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜八纲证候类术语

V009-N00273.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V009-N00273.label: 阴证
V009-N00273.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜八纲证候类术语
V009-N00273.definition: 与阳证相对。泛指具有抑制、内敛、萎靡、机能衰退或色泽晦暗等病机特征，具有统领里证、寒证、虚证辨证意义的一类证候。

V009-N00273.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00273.label: 阴证
V009-N00273.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V009-N00273.definition: Causes inward, downward symptoms and manifests as conditions characterized by inhibition, listlessness, tranquillity and gloominess. It encompasses interior pattern, cold pattern and deficiency pattern.

V009-N00273.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00273.label: 阴证
V009-N00273.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V009-N00273.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V009-N00273.label: 阴证
V009-N00273.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候
V009-N00273.definition: 符合阴的抑制、衰退、沉静、缓慢等属性的证候，是对里证、虚证、寒证的概括。

V009-N00273.label: 阴证
V009-N00273.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候
V009-N00273.definition: 符合阴的抑制、衰退、沉静、缓慢等属性的证候，是对里证、虚证、寒证的概括。

V009-N00273.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V009-N00273.label: 阴证
V009-N00273.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜八纲辨证
V009-N00273.definition: a collective term for interior, cold and deficiency patterns/syndromes with inhibitory, hypofunctional, quiescent or dimmed manifestations, or inward and downward symptoms, as well as morbid conditions caused by pathogenic factors of yin nature

V009-N00286.label: 卫分证
V009-N00286.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜卫气营血证候类术语｜卫分证类

V009-N00286.label: 风热犯表证
V009-N00286.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜病因证候类术语｜风证类｜风热证｜风热外袭证｜风热感冒证

V009-N00286.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V009-N00286.label: 卫分证
V009-N00286.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜卫气营血证候类术语｜卫分证类
V009-N00286.definition: 因温热疫毒等邪由口鼻而入，侵袭肺卫，肺失宣降所致。临床以发热，微恶风寒，咳嗽，咯痰黄白，咽赤肿痛，口渴，鼻流浊涕，舌边尖红，舌苔白或微黄，脉浮数或弦数等为特征的证候。

V009-N00286.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V009-N00286.label: 风热犯表证
V009-N00286.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜病因证候类术语｜风证类｜风热证｜风热外袭证｜风热感冒证
V009-N00286.definition: 因风热时邪客于肌表，腠理不固所致。临床以发热、微恶风寒，汗出、口渴，鼻塞、涕浊，头痛，肢体酸楚，咽喉肿痛，舌尖红，舌苔薄黄，脉浮数，指纹浮紫等为特征的证候。

V009-N00286.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00286.label: 卫分证
V009-N00286.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V009-N00286.definition: Characterized by fever and mild aversion to wind cold. The pulse is superficial and rapid. This pattern often occurs when pathogenic warm heat affects the normal functioning of Wei-defensive qi and disturbs the dispersing and descending of lung qi.

V009-N00286.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00286.label: 卫分证
V009-N00286.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V009-N00286.label: 卫分证
V009-N00286.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V009-N00286.definition: 一般为温病初起，邪犯卫分，肺气失宣，以头痛发热，微恶风寒，口微渴，少汗，咳嗽，咽痛，苔薄白，脉浮数为常见症的证候。

V009-N00286.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V009-N00286.label: 卫分证
V009-N00286.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜卫气营血证候
V009-N00286.definition: 风热之邪侵犯肌表，人体卫外功能失常，肺卫失宣所表现的证候，常见于温热病的初期阶段。

V009-N00286.label: 卫分证
V009-N00286.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜卫气营血证候
V009-N00286.definition: 风热之邪侵犯肌表，人体卫外功能失常，肺卫失宣所表现的证候，常见于温热病的初期阶段。

V009-N00286.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V009-N00286.label: 卫分证
V009-N00286.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜卫气营血辨证类
V009-N00286.definition: the initial stage of an epidemic febrile disease when only the superficial part of the defense qi is involved, marked by fever, slightly aversion to wind and cold, headache, reddened tongue tip and rapid floating pulse

V009-N00295.label: 气分湿热证
V009-N00295.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜卫气营血证候类术语｜气分证类

V009-N00295.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V009-N00295.label: 气分湿热证
V009-N00295.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜卫气营血证候类术语｜气分证类
V009-N00295.definition: 因湿温疫毒等蕴结气分所致。临床以身热不扬。胸闷腹胀，身冃发黄。肢体困倦，呕恶，尿黄，舌质红，舌苔黄腻，脉濡数或滑数，指纹红紫等为特征的证候。

V009-N00295.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00295.label: 气分湿热证
V009-N00295.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V009-N00295.definition: Characterized by unresolved fever after sweating, chest tightness, abdominal distension, yellowish pigmentation of the skin and eyes, limb weakness, nausea, vomiting and yellow urine. The tongue is red with a yellow, greasy coating. The pulse is soft and rapid or slippery and rapid. This pattern often occurs when damp heat affects the qi phase.

V009-N00295.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00295.label: 气分湿热证
V009-N00295.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V009-N00295.label: 气分湿热证
V009-N00295.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V009-N00295.definition: 湿热之邪侵入气分，以身热不扬，胸闷腹胀，身目发黄，肢体困倦，呕恶，尿黄，舌红苔黄腻，脉滑数等为常见症的证候。

V009-N00295.label: 气分湿热证
V009-N00295.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜卫气营血证候｜气分证
V009-N00295.definition: 湿热侵迫气分，以身热不扬，胸闷腹胀，身目发黄，肢体困倦，呕恶，尿黄，舌红苔黄腻，脉濡数或滑数等为常见症的证候。

V009-N00295.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V009-N00295.label: 气分湿热证
V009-N00295.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜卫气营血辨证类
V009-N00295.definition: a pattern/syndrome arising when pathogenic dampness-heat invades qi aspect, marked by unsurfaced fever, oppression in the chest and distension in the abdomen, jaundice, cumbersome limbs, nausea and vomiting, reddened tongue with yellow slimy coating

V009-N00292.label: 气分证
V009-N00292.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜卫气营血证候类术语｜气分证类

V009-N00292.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V009-N00292.label: 气分证
V009-N00292.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜卫气营血证候类术语｜气分证类
V009-N00292.definition: 因温热或湿热疫毒等邪由卫分入气，或直接侵犯气分所致。临床以壮热不已，不恶寒、反恶热，汗出不解，烦渴引饮，舌质红，舌苔黄燥或腻滞，脉洪大或数实有力，指纹紫，可伴见咳嗽、痰黄，鼻煽、气促，胸闷、呕恶，心悸、怔忡，大便秘结，或下利赤白等为特征的证候。

V009-N00292.label: 热盛气分
V009-N00292.path: GBT20348-2006 中医基础理论术语｜病机学｜卫气营血病机｜气分
V009-N00292.definition: 邪入气分，里热蒸腾，伤津耗液的病理变化。

V009-N00292.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00292.label: 气分证
V009-N00292.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V009-N00292.definition: Characterized by fever without aversion to cold. The tongue coating turns yellow. This pattern often occurs when pathogenic warm transforms into heat.

V009-N00292.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00292.label: 气分证
V009-N00292.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V009-N00292.label: 气分证
V009-N00292.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V009-N00292.definition: 一般为温热病的第二个阶段，邪热由卫分传入气分，或径犯气分，或由营分转出，以壮热烦渴，不恶寒，舌红苔黄，脉数，或气促，胸闷脘痞，小便短赤，大便闭结等为常见症的证候。

V009-N00292.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V009-N00292.label: 气分证
V009-N00292.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜卫气营血证候
V009-N00292.definition: 外感温热病邪内入脏腑，正盛邪实，邪正剧争，以壮热烦渴、舌红苔黄、尿赤便结、脉洪或数等为常见症的证候。

V009-N00292.label: 热盛气分
V009-N00292.path: 临床术语｜病因病机｜病机｜卫气营血病机｜气分病机
V009-N00292.definition: 指邪入气分，里热蒸腾，伤津耗液的病理变化。

V009-N00292.label: 气分证
V009-N00292.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜卫气营血证候
V009-N00292.definition: 外感温热病邪内入脏腑，正盛邪实，邪正剧争，以壮热烦渴，舌红苔黄，尿赤便结，脉洪或数等为常见症的证候。

V009-N00292.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V009-N00292.label: 气分证
V009-N00292.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜卫气营血辨证类
V009-N00292.definition: the second stage of an epidemic febrile disease showing intrusion of pathogenic heat on the yang brightness meridian or the lung, gallbladder, spleen, stomach or large intestine, marked by high fever without chills, strong thirst, flushed face, dark u

V009-N00298.label: 营分证
V009-N00298.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜卫气营血证候类术语｜营分证类

V009-N00298.label: 营分热盛证
V009-N00298.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜卫气营血证候类术语｜营分证类｜营分证

V009-N00298.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V009-N00298.label: 营分证
V009-N00298.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜卫气营血证候类术语｜营分证类
V009-N00298.definition: 因温热疫毒等邪入里，或内陷营分，营阴受损，心神被扰所致。临床以身热夜甚，心烦、不寐，甚则神昏、谵语，斑疹隐隐，舌质红绛，舌苔少或无，脉细数，指纹紫滞等为特征的证候。

V009-N00298.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V009-N00298.label: 营分热盛证
V009-N00298.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜卫气营血证候类术语｜营分证类｜营分证
V009-N00298.definition: 因温热疫毒等邪入营，心营热盛所致。临床以午后潮热，夜甚早凉，或高热、烦躁，神昏、谵语，渴不欲饮，舌质深绛，舌苔焦褐或少苔，脉细数或滑数，指纹紫滞，可伴见红斑密布，项强，四肢搐搦，角弓反张等为特征的证候。

V009-N00298.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00298.label: 营分证
V009-N00298.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V009-N00298.definition: Characterized by fever that aggravates at night, restlessness and insomnia. The tongue is deep red. The pulse is thready and rapid. This pattern often occurs when pathogenic heat consumes the Ying nutrient yin and disturbs the heart mind.

V009-N00298.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00298.label: 营分证
V009-N00298.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V009-N00298.label: 营分证
V009-N00298.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V009-N00298.definition: 一般为温热病的第三个阶段，邪热深入，犯及营分，损伤营阴，扰动心神，以身热夜甚，心烦不寐，神昏谵语，癍疹隐隐，舌红绛，脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V009-N00298.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V009-N00298.label: 营分证
V009-N00298.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜卫气营血证候
V009-N00298.definition: 温热病邪内陷，营阴受损，心神被扰，以身热夜甚、心烦不寐、神昏谵语、斑疹隐隐、舌质红绛、脉细而数等为常见症的证候。

V009-N00298.label: 营分证
V009-N00298.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜卫气营血证候
V009-N00298.definition: 温热病邪内陷，营阴受损，心神被扰，以身热夜甚，心烦不寐，神昏谵语，斑疹隐隐，舌质红绛，脉细而数等为常见症的证候。

V009-N00298.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V009-N00298.label: 营分证
V009-N00298.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜卫气营血辨证类
V009-N00298.definition: serious development of an epidemic febrile disease characterized by pathogenic heat entering the nutrient aspect and disturbing the heart (mind), manifested by fever higher at night, restlessness or delirium, faint skin rashes and crimson tongue

V009-N00304.vocabName: GBT15657-2021-中医病证分类与代码
V009-N00304.label: 血分证
V009-N00304.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜卫气营血证候类术语｜血分证类

V009-N00304.vocabName: GBT15657-2021-中医病证分类与代码
V009-N00304.label: 血热证
V009-N00304.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类

V009-N00304.vocabName: GBT15657-2021-中医病证分类与代码
V009-N00304.label: 血热妄行证
V009-N00304.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血热证｜血热内盛证

V009-N00304.vocabName: GBT15657-2021-中医病证分类与代码
V009-N00304.label: 热入血分证
V009-N00304.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜病因证候类术语｜火证类｜火热证｜热在营血证

V009-N00304.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V009-N00304.label: 血分证
V009-N00304.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜卫气营血证候类术语｜血分证类
V009-N00304.definition: 因温热疫毒等邪深入血分，耗血伤阴，动血生风所致。临床以壮热或夜热早凉，手足抽搐或蠕动。神昏、谵语，斑疹紫黑，舌质深绛，舌苔少或无，脉弦数，指纹紫黑，伴见吐血或衄血、尿血、便血等为特征的证候。

V009-N00304.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V009-N00304.label: 血热证
V009-N00304.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类
V009-N00304.definition: 泛指因血热内蕴，或热入血分，壅滞肌腠，灼伤血络，迫血妄行，内扰脏腑，化燥伤阴、夹湿动风等所引起的一类证候。

V009-N00304.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V009-N00304.label: 血热妄行证
V009-N00304.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血热证｜血热内盛证
V009-N00304.definition: 因邪入血分，迫血妄行，或血热内盛，灼伤血络所致。临床以突然大咳血或呕血、衄血、便血、尿血、产后血崩等，势急量多，血色鲜红或紫暗，或斑疹密布，颜色紫赤，舌质红，舌苔黄，脉弦数，可伴见身热、神昏，狂躁不安，头胀，眩晕，胸胁脘腹疼痛等为特征的证候。

V009-N00304.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V009-N00304.label: 热入血分证
V009-N00304.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜病因证候类术语｜火证类｜火热证｜热在营血证
V009-N00304.definition: 因温热邪毒深入血分，迫血妄行所致。临床以温热外感病过程中出现咳血或吐血、衄血、尿血、便血，斑疹密布，色紫或黑，舌质深绛或起刺，脉数，伴见身热、口渴，心烦、不寐等为特征的证候。

V009-N00304.vocabName: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分
V009-N00304.label: 热入血分证
V009-N00304.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学证候｜卫气营血证｜血分证
V009-N00304.definition: SH11；是

V009-N00304.vocabName: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分
V009-N00304.label: 血热证
V009-N00304.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学证候｜气血津液证｜血证
V009-N00304.definition: SF02；是

V009-N00304.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00304.label: 热入血分证
V009-N00304.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V009-N00304.definition: Characterized by haemorrhagic symptoms such as haemoptysis, nosebleed, bloody urine and bloody stools. Alternatively, a high-grade fever, unconsciousness and twitching of hands/feet may be present. The tongue is dark purple. This pattern often occurs when fire/heat consumes Ying nutrients and blood.

V009-N00304.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00304.label: 血分证
V009-N00304.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V009-N00304.definition: Characterized by fever that aggravates at night, restlessness, insomnia, unconsciousness, delirium, a dark purple tongue and a wiry, rapid pulse. Alternatively, dark purple maculae, haematemesis, nosebleed, bloody stools, bloody urine, a dry tongue with a scanty coating and a thready, deficient pulse may be present. This pattern often occurs when heat in febrile conditions moves blood, stirs wind and consumes yin.

V009-N00304.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00304.label: 血热证
V009-N00304.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V009-N00304.definition: Characterized by haemoptysis, haematemesis, nosebleed, bloody urine, bloody stools with a bright red, sticky colour, and earlier period with heavy menstruation. Alternatively, red, swollen and painful sores/boils, restlessness, thirst, and fever may be present. The tongue is deep red. The pulse is slippery and rapid. Often occurs when exuberant fire heat in the zang–fu organs causes the blood to flow recklessly.

V009-N00307.definition: 因温热疫毒等邪深入血分，耗血伤阴，动血生风所致。临床以壮热或夜热早凉，手足抽搐或蠕动。神昏、谵语，斑疹紫黑，舌质深绛，舌苔少或无，脉弦数，指纹紫黑，伴见吐血或衄血、尿血、便血等为特征的证候。

V009-N00307.definition: 因温热邪毒深入血分，迫血妄行所致。临床以温热外感病过程中出现咳血或吐血、衄血、尿血、便血，斑疹密布，色紫或黑，舌质深绛或起刺，脉数，伴见身热、口渴，心烦、不寐等为特征的证候。

Alternatively, a high-grade fever, unconsciousness and twitching of hands/feet may be present. The tongue is dark purple. This pattern often occurs when fire/heat consumes Ying nutrients and blood.

V009-N00358.definition: 泛指因各种原因导致气机郁滞，内生或兼夹湿、痰、热、火、瘀浊等邪，影响经络、脏腑、官窍功能等所引起的一类证候。

V009-N00358.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候

V009-N00358.definition: 泛指因各种原因导致气机不畅，或气郁而不散，阻滞脏腑、经络、官窍等所引起的一类证候。

V009-N00358.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00358.label: 气滞证
V009-N00358.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V009-N00358.definition: Characterized by migratory distension, fullness and pain in the subcostal region and abdomen that alleviate after sighing, belching, bowel sounds and flatus. The pulse is wiry. Often results from qi stagnation of the zang–fu organs or in the localized area.

V009-N00358.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00358.label: 气滞证

V009-N00358.label: 气滞证
V009-N00358.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V009-N00358.definition: 气机阻滞，运行不畅，以胸胁、脘腹胀闷疼痛，时轻时重，时作时休，或走窜不定，胀痛可随暖气、肠鸣、矢气而减，脉弦等为常见症的证候。

V009-N00358.label: 气滞证
V009-N00358.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气病
V009-N00358.definition: 某些脏腑或局部气机阻滞，以胸胁脘腹胀闷疼痛，时轻时重，走窜不定，胀痛常随太息、嗳气、肠鸣、矢气而减，脉弦等为常见症的证候。

V009-N00358.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V009-N00358.label: 气滞证
V009-N00358.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜气血辨证类
V009-N00358.definition: a pattern/syndrome resulting from stagnation of qi, marked by intermittent thoracic, hypochondriac, epigastric and abdominal distention or pain, often ameliorated by sighing or belching

V009-N00358.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V009-N00358.label: 气郁证
V009-N00358.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜气血辨证类
V009-N00358.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by feeling of distension in the chest, pain in the hypochondriac region, irritability, irascibility, anorexia and menstrual disorders in women, the same as the qi stagnation pattern/syndrome

V009-N00359.label: 气脱证
V009-N00359.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气机失调证｜气滞证

V009-N00359.label: 元气败脱证

V009-N00359.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V009-N00359.label: 气脱证

V009-N00359.definition: 因外感或内伤等原因，致使真气急骤外泄所致。临床以突然面色苍白，口唇青紫，汗出，肢冷，呼吸微弱，舌质淡，脉细数等为特征的证候。

V009-N00359.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V009-N00359.label: 元气败脱证
V009-N00359.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气虚证｜元气不足证
V009-N00359.definition: 因外感、内伤耗损真元，阴不恋阳，元气暴脱所致。临床以骤然冷汗淋漓，四肢逆冷，口开、手撒，气息微弱，二便失禁，神志昏愦，甚则昏迷不醒，瞳神散大，舌质暗淡或紫，脉微欲绝等为特征的证候。

V009-N00359.label: 气脱证
V009-N00359.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V009-N00359.definition: Characterized by a sudden pale complexion, cyanotic lips, sweating, cold limbs and faint breathing. The tongue is pale. The pulse is thready and rapid. Often results from sudden and rapid leaking of qi.

V009-N00359.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00359.label: 气脱证
V009-N00359.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V009-N00359.label: 气脱证
V009-N00359.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V009-N00359.definition: 真气急骤外泄，以突然大汗淋漓，面色苍白，口唇青紫，目合口张，肢冷，呼吸微弱，甚者昏迷，二便失禁，舌淡，脉微欲绝等为常见症的危重证候。

V009-N00359.label: 气脱证
V009-N00359.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气病
V009-N00359.definition: 真气因某种原因而急聚外泄，以突然面色苍白，口唇青紫，汗出肢冷，呼 吸微弱，舌淡脉细数为常见症的危重证候。

V009-N00359.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V009-N00359.label: 气脱证
V009-N00359.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜气血辨证类
V009-N00359.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by sudden appearance of profuse sweating, somber pale complexion, cyanotic lips, cold extremities, feeble breathing, even fainting or loss of consciousness with incontinence of urine, pale tongue and hardly perceptible pulse

V009-N00361.label: 气逆证
V009-N00361.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气机失调证｜气滞证

V009-N00361.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V009-N00361.label: 气逆证
V009-N00361.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气机失调证
V009-N00361.definition: 泛指因肺、肝、肾、胃等脏腑气机逆乱，上逆或横逆等所引起的一类证候。注：包括肺气上逆证、胃热气逆证、胃寒气逆证、胃滞气逆证、肝肾气逆证、肝气犯胃证、肝气犯肺证等。

V009-N00361.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00361.label: 气逆证
V009-N00361.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V009-N00361.definition: Characterized by dizziness, blurred vision, vomiting, belching, hiccups, and acid reflux. In severe cases, sudden fainting or panting may be present. Often results from counterflow of qi or disordered qi activity.

V009-N00361.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00361.label: 气逆证
V009-N00361.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V009-N00361.label: 气逆证
V009-N00361.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V009-N00361.definition: 气机升降失常，逆乱向上所致的证候，因脏腑逆气不同，表现可各不相同。

V009-N00361.label: 气逆证
V009-N00361.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气病
V009-N00361.definition: 泛指气机逆乱向上，以咳嗽气喘，或恶心、呕吐、呃逆、嗳气，或觉气从少腹上冲胸咽，胸胁胀闷，头胀眩晕等为常见症的证候。

V009-N00361.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V009-N00361.label: 气逆证
V009-N00361.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜气血辨证类
V009-N00361.definition: a pattern/syndrome arising when qi moves abnormally upward, manifested by cough and dyspnea, or nausea, vomiting, hiccup, belching or even hematemesis, or feeling of gas ascending from the lesser abdomen to the chest or throat with distension and oppr

V009-N00362.label: 气陷证
V009-N00362.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气机失调证｜气滞证

V009-N00362.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V009-N00362.label: 气陷证
V009-N00362.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气机失调证
V009-N00362.definition: 因气虚无力升举，中气下陷所致。临床以头晕，眼花，少气，倦怠，舌质淡，舌苔白，脉弱，可伴见脘腹坠胀，脱肛，内脏、子宫下垂，久痢久泄等为特征的证候。

V009-N00362.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00362.label: 气陷证
V009-N00362.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V009-N00362.definition: Characterized by dizziness, blurred vision, lassitude, a bearing-down sensation in the abdomen, rectal prolapse, and prolapsed internal organs or uterus. The tongue is pale with a white coating. The pulse is weak. Often occurs when qi fails to ascend.

V009-N00362.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00362.label: 气陷证
V009-N00362.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V009-N00362.label: 气陷证
V009-N00362.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V009-N00362.definition: 气虚升举无力，应升反降，以头晕眼花，少气倦怠，院腹坠胀，脱肛，胃、肾、子宫等内脏下垂，舌谈苔白，脉细弱等为常见症的证候。

V009-N00362.label: 气陷证
V009-N00362.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气病
V009-N00362.definition: 气虚无力升举，应升反降，以头晕眼花，少气倦怠，脘腹坠胀，脱肛，内脏、子宫下垂，舌淡苔白，脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V009-N00362.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V009-N00362.label: 气陷证
V009-N00362.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜气血辨证类
V009-N00362.definition: a pattern/syndrome resulting from failure in its lifting or holding function, marked by dizziness, blurred vision, shortage of qi, lassitude, prolapse of the anus, prolapse of the uterus or visceroptosis, pale tongue with white coating and weak pulse

V009-N00525.label: 脾气下陷证
V009-N00525.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气机失调证｜气滞证｜气陷证

V009-N00525.label: 中气下陷证
V009-N00525.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气虚证｜中气亏虚证

V009-N00525.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V009-N00525.label: 脾气下陷证
V009-N00525.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气机失调证｜气陷证
V009-N00525.definition: 因脾气虚弱，中气下陷所致。临床以胃脘坠胀，食后加重，或肛门重坠，便意频数，或久泄脱肛，小便频数，甚或失禁，或子宫下垂，崩漏，胎漏，舌质淡，舌苔白，脉缓弱，伴见食少、便溏，消瘦、乏力，头晕、目眩等为特征的证候。

V009-N00525.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V009-N00525.label: 中气下陷证
V009-N00525.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气虚证｜中气亏虚证
V009-N00525.definition: 因中气亏损，清阳不升，反而陷下所致。临床以小腹坠胀，尿频滴沥，甚则遗尿、失禁，或久泻不止，肛门重坠、脱肛，或阴挺，舌质淡，舌苔薄白，脉缓细，伴见脘腹坠胀，神疲、乏力，头晕、食少等为特征的证候。

V009-N00525.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00525.label: 脾气下陷证
V009-N00525.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V009-N00525.definition: Characterized by a bearing-down sensation in the abdomen that aggravates after eating food. Frequent urges to defaecate with a bearing-down sensation of the anus, persistent diarrhoea, rectal prolapse, prolapsed uterus or cloudy urine may be present. Associated symptoms may include shortness of breath, fatigue, lassitude, reluctance to talk, dizziness, blurred vision, a pale, lustreless face, poor appetite and loose stools. The tongue is pale with a white coating. The pulse is delayed and weak. This pattern often develops from severe spleen qi deficiency and occurs when spleen qi fails to ascend.

V009-N00525.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00525.label: 脾虚气陷证
V009-N00525.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V009-N00525.label: 脾虚气陷证
V009-N00525.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V009-N00525.definition: 脾气虚弱，中气下陷，以神疲乏力，头晕食少，腹胀便溏，或脘腹坠胀，食后益甚，或便意频数，肛门重坠，或久泻不止，或脱肛，或阴挺，或小便浑浊，或崩漏、胎漏，舌淡苔白，脉缓弱等为常见症的证候。

V009-N00525.label: 脾气下陷证
V009-N00525.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜脾和胃证候｜脾系证候
V009-N00525.definition: 脾气虚弱，中气下陷，以脘腹重坠作胀，食后益甚，或便意频数，肛门重坠，或脱肛、阴挺，或小便混浊，或久泄不止，或崩漏、胎漏，神疲乏力，食少，腹胀，便溏，眩晕，舌淡，脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V009-N00525.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V009-N00525.label: 中气下陷证
V009-N00525.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜气血辨证类
V009-N00525.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by bearing-down sensation in the epigastrium and abdomen, protracted diarrhea, even prolapse of rectum or visceroptosis

V009-N00525.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V009-N00525.label: 脾虚气陷证
V009-N00525.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜脏腑辨证类
V009-N00525.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by epigastric bearingdown sensation, more prominent after meals, or urgency of defecation at short intervals with bearingdown feeling of the anus, or chronic persistent diarrhea, or prolapse of the rectum or uterus, associate

V009-N00303.label: 营卫不和证
V009-N00303.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气机失调证

V009-N00303.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V009-N00303.label: 营卫不和证
V009-N00303.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气机失调证
V009-N00303.definition: 因卫弱营强，腠理不固，或卫强营弱，阳气郁于肌表，内迫营阴所致。临床以发热，或微恶风寒，时有汗出，脉缓等为特征的证候。

V009-N00303.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00303.label: 营卫不和证
V009-N00303.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V009-N00303.definition: Characterized by spontaneous sweating without fever. Alternatively, patients may present with fever and spontaneous sweating, or neither. This pattern often occurs when yang qi becomes deficient or when stagnant yang qi in the surface of the body affects Ying nutrients and yin fluids.

V009-N00303.label: 营卫不和证
V009-N00303.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜表里证候｜表证
V009-N00303.definition: 卫弱营强，或卫强营弱，以身微热或微恶风寒、时有汗出、脉缓等为常见症的证候。

V009-N00360.label: 气虚证
V009-N00360.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类

V009-N00360.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V009-N00360.label: 气虚证
V009-N00360.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类
V009-N00360.definition: 泛指因先天禀赋不足，或后天调养不当，致使气虚失充或不摄、下陷、虚脱等所引起的一类证候。

V009-N00360.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00360.label: 气虚证
V009-N00360.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V009-N00360.definition: Characterized by shortness of breath, fatigue, lassitude, reluctance to talk, and spontaneous sweating. The tongue is pale. The pulse is deficient. Often results from hypofunctions of the zang–fu organs.

V009-N00360.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00360.label: 气虚证
V009-N00360.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V009-N00360.label: 气虚证
V009-N00360.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V009-N00360.definition: 元气不足，脏腑机能衰退，以气短乏力，神疲懒言，自汗，舌淡，脉虚等为常见症的证候。

V009-N00360.label: 气虚证
V009-N00360.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气病
V009-N00360.definition: 元气不足，脏腑机能衰退，以气短乏力、神疲懒言、自汗、舌淡、脉虚等为常见症的证候。

V009-N00360.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V009-N00360.label: 气虚证
V009-N00360.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜气血辨证类
V009-N00360.definition: a pattern/syndrome of deficiency of genuine qi with diminished function of internal organs, marked by shortness of breath, lassitude, listlessness, spontaneous sweating, pale tongue and weak pulse

V009-N00367.label: 津液亏虚证
V009-N00367.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜津液证类

V009-N00367.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V009-N00367.label: 津液亏虚证
V009-N00367.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜津液证类
V009-N00367.definition: 泛指因外感、内伤，或中毒、烧伤，治疗不当等，伤津劫液，形体失却润养所引起的一类证候。

V009-N00367.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00367.label: 津液亏虚证
V009-N00367.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V009-N00367.definition: Characterized by dry mouth, nose, throat and lips, thirst with a desire to drink water, scanty urine and constipation. The tongue is dry and red. The pulse is thready, rapid and weak. Often occurs when bodily fluids fail to nourish the zang–fu organs and tissues.

V009-N00367.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00367.label: 津液亏虚证
V009-N00367.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V009-N00367.label: 津液亏虚证
V009-N00367.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜辨证
V009-N00367.definition: 津液亏损，脏腑组织失却濡养，以口燥咽干，唇焦或裂，渴欲饮水，小便短少，大便于结，舌红少津，脉细数无力等为常见症的证候。

V009-N00367.label: 津液亏损证
V009-N00367.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜津液病
V009-N00367.definition: 津液亏少，脏腑组织失却濡养，以口燥咽干，唇焦或裂，渴欲饮水，小便短少，大便干结，舌红少津，脉细数无力等为常见症的证候。

V009-N00367.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V009-N00367.label: 津液亏虚证
V009-N00367.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜津液辨证类
V009-N00367.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by dry mouth and throat, parched or cracked lips, thirst with desire for drink, oliguria, constipation, reddened tongue lacking moisture, and rapid fine weak pulse

V009-N00379.label: 血寒证
V009-N00379.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类

V009-N00379.label: 血寒凝滞证
V009-N00379.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血寒证

V009-N00379.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V009-N00379.label: 血寒证
V009-N00379.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类
V009-N00379.definition: 泛指寒客血脉，凝滞气血，或血虚寒凝，血行不畅所引起的一类证候。

V009-N00379.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V009-N00379.label: 血寒凝滞证
V009-N00379.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血寒证
V009-N00379.definition: 因寒客血脉，凝滞气机，血行不畅所致。临床以肢体麻木冷痛，局部紫暗、发凉，手足清冷，喜暖、恶寒，得温痛减，或少腹疼痛，月经衍期，痛经，经色紫暗，夹有血块，唇色青紫，舌质暗淡，舌苔白，脉沉迟涩等为特征的证候。
